headline: Turn The ADP Shares You Own Into A 9% Income Stream
summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on shares you already own, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for capping your gains at a price above today's.

headline: Automatic Data Processing: The Margins Are Too High, I'll Pass
summary: Automatic Data Processing is rated hold as AI may weaken payroll/HR moat and pressure margins as competition rises. Click here for this ADP stock update.
